title: Colored Hex Blocks
description: This mod aims to add blocks that you can dye like leather armor adding millions of color combinations for blocks.
body:
This mod adds a new block called a hex block that you can dye like leather armor, as of right now it is just the block and stair variant with plans to add walls, slabs, fence, etc. into the project making the amount of possibilities endless.

Craft using a single terracotta surrounded by 8 concrete, then all the variant blocks are crafted using the vanilla methods.
